name: Woodstock Wild Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring chicken broth and water to a boil over medium heat. Add wild rice. Simmer, covered, over low heat for 25 minutes.
2. Uncover the saucepan. Add white rice, mushrooms, garlic, salt, and saffron. Bring mixture back to a boil. Cover and simmer on low heat for 20 minutes or until rice is tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in chopped green onions and fresh parsley. Cover and let stand for 10 minutes. Just before serving, stir in grated lemon zest. Garnish with strips of lemon zest and sprigs of parsley.
Nutrient Value per Serving: 183 calories, 6 g protein, 1 g fat (3% from fat), 39 g carbohydrate, 559 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol.
